name_cn:
P🔥 🆕 New Arrival 👏【Exclusive Background】
Elephant Print (Mini Size)
🌈 A new member of the Niki family, the mini is simply too cool 😎. The bag shape is beautiful with no flaws; soft sheepskin creates a retro yet stylish look. Crossbody or underarm styles are both great, suitable for both men and women. Combines fashion and functionality. Comfortable and stylish to wear, with ample capacity for daily outings 👍
Model: 828736
Size: 18×12.5×5cm
